# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the changes made.

---

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Optimization
- [ ] Documentation update

---

## Blender Version

Example: Blender 4.2

---

## Screenshots / Renders

Add screenshots or rendered previews if possible.

---

## Checklist

- [ ] Tested changes
- [ ] Updated documentation
- [ ] No unnecessary files included
